# We have to load the multiuser plugin before the POSC plugin # This is because when the POSC plugin issues a filesystem operation it will need to call # into the multiuser plugin to handle the operation on behalf of the user. # If the multiuser plugin is disabled, then POSC will just use the base OSS plugin.
xrootd.seclib libXrdSec.so ofs.authorize 1 acc.audit deny grant acc.authdb /var/folders/mn/js5hmsy13552y330w_94s79h0000gn/T/Pelican-FedTest2979130496/origin/authfile-origin-generated acc.authrefresh 300 ofs.authlib ++ libXrdAccSciTokens.so config=/var/folders/mn/js5hmsy13552y330w_94s79h0000gn/T/Pelican-FedTest2979130496/origin/scitokens-origin-generated.cfg
# Tell xrootd to make each namespace we export available as a path at the server all.export /test-namespace # Note we don't want to export this via cmsd; only for self-test xrootd.export /pelican/monitoring xrootd.export /.well-known http.exthandler xrdpelican libXrdHttpPelican.so xrootd.fslib ++ throttle # throttle plugin is needed to calculate server IO load xrootd.chksum max 10 md5 adler32 crc32 crc32c xrd.sched maxt 20000 xrootd.trace debug emsg login stall redirect request stall ofs.trace debug oss.trace debug info warning error xrd.trace debug cms.trace debug http.trace all xrootd.tls all xrd.network nodnr scitokens.trace debug info warning error
http.maxdelay 9 # Enable third-party copies http.exthandler xrdtpc libXrdHttpTPC.so
# Add in http headers to make the web client capable of requesting resources http.staticheader -verb=OPTIONS Access-Control-Allow-Origin * http.staticheader -verb=OPTIONS Access-Control-Allow-Methods GET,PUT,PROPFIND http.staticheader -verb=OPTIONS Access-Control-Allow-Headers Authorization,Want-Digest,Content-Type,User-Agent,Depth,Content-Length,Translate
http.staticheader -verb=GET Access-Control-Allow-Origin * http.staticheader -verb=GET Access-Control-Allow-Headers Authorization,Want-Digest,Content-Type,User-Agent
http.staticheader -verb=PUT Access-Control-Allow-Origin * http.staticheader -verb=PUT Access-Control-Allow-Headers Authorization
http.staticheader -verb=PROPFIND Access-Control-Allow-Origin * http.staticheader -verb=PROPFIND Access-Control-Allow-Headers Depth,Content-Type,Authorization,Content-Length,Translate
